category_sources: Official docs at https://docs.pidgin.im/ describe Pidgin as a chat program for multiple chat networks simultaneously.
display_name_sources: Official docs at https://docs.pidgin.im/ use the display name Pidgin.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation site is https://docs.pidgin.im/.
Official developer documentation site is https://developer.pidgin.im/.
repo_sources: Official GitHub mirror page https://github.com/pidgin/pidgin states the source code repository is https://keep.imfreedom.org/pidgin/pidgin.
Official developer page https://developer.pidgin.im/wiki/UsingPidginMercurial says Pidgin source resides in Mercurial repositories.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://docs.pidgin.im/ mention XMPP, IRC, and multiple chat networks.
source_facts.description identifies a multi-protocol chat client.
